ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL) */,
  "collar_inch" TEXT /* Collar size in inches */,
  "collar_cm" TEXT /* Collar size in centimeters */,
  "chest_inch" TEXT /* Chest size in inches */,
  "chest_cm" TEXT /* Chest size in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_inch" TEXT /* Sleeve length in inches */,
  "waist_inch" TEXT /* Waist size in inches */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Waist size in centimeters */,
  "hip_inch" TEXT /* Hip size in inches */,
  "hip_cm" TEXT /* Hip size in centimeters */,
  "inseam_inch" TEXT /* Inseam length in inches */,
  "inseam_cm" TEXT /* Inseam length in centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing (e.g., tops, bottoms) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand associated with the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description providing details about the product */,
  "base_price" REAL /* Base price of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is designed */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used for the product */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the product is suitable */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product-size mapping */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated size */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity available for that size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of residence */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who entered the measurements */,
  "collar_size" TEXT /* Collar size provided by the customer */,
  "chest_size" TEXT /* Chest size provided by the customer */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length provided by the customer */,
  "waist_size" TEXT /* Waist size provided by the customer */,
  "hip_size" TEXT /* Hip size provided by the customer */,
  "inseam_length" TEXT /* Inseam length provided by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order is shipped */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order detail record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product included in the order */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Size ID of the ordered product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_types" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, customer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated customer */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for authentication */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product-size mapping */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Quantity currently in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the item should be reordered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the inventory is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Supplier's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Supplier's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Supplier's state */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Supplier's zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Supplier's country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "product_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-supplier relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was processed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Size ID of the product */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., viewed, added to cart) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the engagement in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the size chart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
